creator: hroi@yahoo.com
text:
Kernel panics when issuing
dd if=/dev/zero of=/dev/da0e count=1024

Has been repeated 5-6 times in row.

SCSI adapter is Adaptec 2940UW with two
IBM SCSI disks.
Additional info:
$dmesg
